text: The Sr Director and project team are responsible for creating a comprehensive preconstruction plan that details how they intend to build the project. The plan should include safety considerations throughout the build and their mitigation plans, and examples given for clarity. Once the plan is created the team will provide a presentation in a peer group format. The meeting invitation should include the super regions Managing Director, Sr Directors, QC, and Safety in their super region. The presentation will be presented via a team's meeting in a PPT format.
